diagrams.title: Requirements Engineering Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential flow of RE phases from feasibility to management
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete RE lifecycle and how phases connect

diagrams.title: Requirements Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Hierarchical structure from business goals to specific requirements
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how high-level goals decompose into detailed requirements

diagrams.title: Use Case Diagram Example
diagrams.description: Sample diagram showing actors interacting with system functions
elements: Use Cases (Login, Add User, Generate Report)
diagrams.purpose: Learning to represent functional requirements visually from user perspective

diagrams.title: Requirements Traceability Matrix
diagrams.description: Grid showing links between requirements and development artifacts
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to track requirements throughout development lifecycle
